server._comment_spec: Optional: override the URLs advertised for the live AsyncAPI/OpenAPI specs. Defaults are /spec/asyncapi.json and /spec/openapi.json (served by the bridge).

_comment_proxy: Global proxy for ALL outbound channel-plugin traffic (fetch + WebSocket). Schemes: http://, https://, socks5:// (alias socks://). Omit to honor HTTPS_PROXY/HTTP_PROXY/ALL_PROXY env vars.

liangzimixin._comment_proxy: Channel/account-level proxy overrides take precedence over the global proxy. Put a 'proxy' string here or inside an account to route just this channel.

openclaw-weixin._comment: WeChat uses QR code login — leave accounts empty and visit /plugin/openclaw-weixin/default/qr to scan

whatsapp._comment: WhatsApp (@openclaw/whatsapp) links via QR — leave accounts empty and visit /plugin/whatsapp/default/qr to scan. allowFrom is E.164 numbers; dmPolicy 'pairing' lets unknown senders request access.

msteams._comment: MS Teams only offers outbound webhooks, so inbound flows through the standalone webhook-receiver (../webhook-receiver/). Set webhook:true and point pollUrl at the receiver's /webhook/<token>/poll endpoint. outboundUrl is an optional relay that turns send_text into the Teams send-message API call; omit it for an inbound-only channel.
